segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I've been put in charge of food for the city football team's holiday party next week, and I don't know where to start. How many people will be there? Around 40. That's a big group. The 1st thing you need to do is find out people's likes and dislikes and see if anyone has any dietary restrictions. That makes sense. How do I go about it? Just write up a little questionnaire and send it to everyone. Then based on the responses, write up a menu and go shopping. Nice. I'll work on that now.
